headline: Iron Mountain Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) reported record first-quarter 2026 results and raised its full-year outlook after posting 22% year-over-year growth in revenue, adjusted EBITDA, and adjusted funds from operations (AFFO). headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Iron Mountain, Raises Price Target to $138
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Andrew Steinerman   maintains Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $121 to $138.

headline: Jim Cramer Says 'Data Center' Trade Is Going Mainstream
summary: Jim Cramer says the stock market's biggest winners are all tied to one theme: data centers.
